ham.subject: 2026 Annual Wellness Program – Register Today!
ham.body:
Hello Team,

We are excited to launch the 2026 Annual Wellness Program. This program offers on‑site health screenings, fitness challenges, and a wellness stipend of up to $300.

To sign up, visit the employee portal at <URL> and complete the registration before July 15th.

For any questions, contact wellness@company.com.

Thank you,
HR Wellness Committee

spam.subject: URGENT: Security Alert – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear [Employee Name],

Our security monitoring has detected unusual login activity from a foreign IP address. To protect your account and company data, you must verify your identity within 30 minutes. Failure to do so will result in a temporary suspension and a potential payroll deduction.

Click the link below to verify now:
<URL>

If you believe this is a mistake, please reply to this email only from your managed device or call the IT Help Desk at 555‑1234.

— IT Security Team
